business.name: Terry Towing Services in Dallas
business.tagline: Fast, Reliable Towing & Roadside Assistance in Dallas

seo.title: Terry Towing Services in Dallas | 24/7 Towing & Roadside Assistance
seo.description: Terry Towing offers fast, affordable towing and roadside assistance in Dallas. Light, medium, and heavy-duty towing. Call (214) 878-7453 for 24/7 service.

hero.headline: 24/7 Towing & Roadside Assistance in Dallas
hero.subheadline: When you're stranded, count on Terry Towing for fast, professional, and affordable service. We're here 24/7.

featureSections.title: Light, Medium & Heavy-Duty Towing
featureSections.body: From motorcycles to semi-trucks, our fleet and experienced operators handle it all. We arrive quickly and get you back on the road.
bullets: Light-duty towing for cars and SUVs
Medium-duty for vans and small trucks
Heavy-duty for large trucks and equipment
featureSections.cardBody: No matter the time, our team is ready to respond. Just call and we'll be there fast.

featureSections.title: More Than Just Towing
featureSections.body: We offer a full range of roadside services to get you out of a jam, from jump-starts to tire changes and lockout assistance.
featureSections.cardBody: Stuck on the side of the road? We'll get you moving again with prompt, professional help.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Response Times
whyChooseUs.description: We pride ourselves on arriving quickly, minimizing your wait time.

whyChooseUs.title: Affordable Rates
whyChooseUs.description: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Quality service at a fair price.

whyChooseUs.title: Professional Operators
whyChooseUs.description: Our team is trained, licensed, and courteous. We treat you with respect.

whyChooseUs.title: 24/7 Availability
whyChooseUs.description: Day or night, weekends and holidays, we're here when you need us.

testimonials.quote: Terry Towing saved me on a late-night breakdown. Fast, friendly, and fair price. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: James R.

testimonials.quote: I've used them twice now – always prompt and professional. They handled my SUV with care.
testimonials.author: Maria L.

testimonials.quote: Best towing company in Dallas. They arrived in 20 minutes and got me back on the road.
testimonials.author: David K.

cta.headline: Need a Tow? Call Us Now!
cta.subheadline: 24/7 service, fast response, and friendly professionals.

servicesPage.intro: At Terry Towing, we provide a full range of towing and roadside assistance services in Dallas. Our experienced team and modern equipment ensure safe, efficient service every time.

services.title: Light-Duty Towing
services.shortDescription: Fast towing for cars, SUVs, and small vehicles.
services.longDescription: Our light-duty towing service is perfect for passenger vehicles. We use flatbeds and wheel-lifts to ensure safe transport. Whether you've broken down or need a jump, we're here.

process.title: Call Us
process.description: Contact our dispatch team with your location and vehicle info.

process.title: We Arrive
process.description: We send the nearest truck to your location promptly.

process.title: Safe Towing
process.description: We carefully load and transport your vehicle to your destination.

faqs.question: How much does light-duty towing cost?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on distance and vehicle type. Contact us for a free quote.

faqs.question: What areas do you cover?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Dallas and surrounding areas.

services.title: Medium-Duty Towing
services.shortDescription: Reliable towing for vans, small trucks, and buses.
services.longDescription: Our medium-duty towing handles larger vehicles like box trucks, shuttle buses, and delivery vans. We have the equipment and expertise to tow them safely.

process.title: Contact Us
process.description: Provide details about your vehicle and location.

process.title: Dispatch
process.description: We send the appropriate truck and crew.

process.title: Tow & Go
process.description: Your vehicle is towed securely to your chosen location.

faqs.question: Can you tow a box truck?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can tow box trucks and other medium-duty vehicles.

faqs.question: Do you offer roadside assistance for medium-duty vehicles?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide tire changes, jump-starts, and more for these vehicles.

services.title: Heavy-Duty Towing
services.shortDescription: Professional towing for semi-trucks, RVs, and equipment.
services.longDescription: Our heavy-duty towing service handles the biggest vehicles on the road. With rotators and landolls, we can recover and tow semi-trucks, RVs, and heavy equipment safely.

process.title: Call for Heavy Tow
process.description: Tell us about your vehicle and situation.

process.title: Heavy-Duty Dispatch
process.description: We send the right equipment for the job.

process.title: Safe Recovery
process.description: Our team carefully recovers and tows your vehicle.

faqs.question: Can you tow a semi-truck?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We have the equipment and experience to tow semi-trucks and trailers.

faqs.question: What about RVs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can tow RVs and motorhomes of all sizes.

services.title: Roadside Assistance
services.shortDescription: Jump-starts, tire changes, lockout help, and more.
services.longDescription: Our roadside assistance service is designed to get you back on the road quickly. From a dead battery to a flat tire, we've got you covered 24/7.

process.title: Request Help
process.description: Call us and describe your issue.

process.title: Get Assistance
process.description: We arrive and solve the problem on-site.

process.title: Back on Road
process.description: You're on your way in no time.

faqs.question: Do you provide fuel delivery?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can bring enough fuel to get you to a station.

faqs.question: Can you unlock my car?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer lockout assistance for most vehicles.

about.headline: Dallas's Reliable Towing Company
about.mission: To provide fast, affordable, and professional towing and roadside assistance to the Dallas community, 24/7.
story: Terry Towing was founded with a simple mission: help stranded drivers get back on the road quickly and safely. Over the years, we've grown from a single truck to a fleet serving all of Dallas. Our team shares a commitment to customer service and reliability.

We understand that breakdowns and accidents are stressful. That's why we focus on prompt response, clear communication, and fair pricing. Whether it's a simple jump-start or a complex heavy-duty tow, we treat every customer with respect and professionalism.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up when we say we will, every time.

coreValues.title: Professionalism
coreValues.description: Our team is trained, courteous, and respectful.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: Proudly serving Dallas and supporting local drivers.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Contact us for a free quote or emergency service.
